# MuleSoft DataGraph

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version of DataGraph documentation.
> See [DataGraph llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/datagraph/llms-full.txt) for all the DataGraph documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Adding API Sources to the Unified Schema](https://docs.mulesoft.com/datagraph/add-api-to-unified-schema.md)
- [Scaling API Calls in Anypoint DataGraph](https://docs.mulesoft.com/datagraph/api-call-scaling.md)
- [Anypoint DataGraph API Extension Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/datagraph/api-extensions.md)
- [Enabling Object Type Collaboration in Anypoint DataGraph](https://docs.mulesoft.com/datagraph/collaboration.md)

- [Anypoint DataGraph CLI Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/datagraph/datagraph-cli.md)
